recommendations.title: The Spanish Prisoner
recommendations.overview: An inventor of a secret process suddenly finds himself alone as both his friends and the corporation he works for turn against him.

recommendations.title: House of Games
recommendations.overview: A psychiatrist comes to the aid of a compulsive gambler and is led by a smooth-talking grifter into the shadowy but compelling world of stings, scams, and con men.

recommendations.title: Homicide
recommendations.overview: While investigating the ruthless murder of an elderly woman, a Jewish police detective unravels a bizarre conspiracy involving a Zionist organization.

recommendations.title: State and Main
recommendations.overview: The residents of a small Vermont town don't know what hit them when a beleaguered Hollywood film crew brings a chaotic shoot to their quaint village.

recommendations.title: Phil Spector
recommendations.genres: Drama, TV Movie, Crime, History, Music
recommendations.overview: A drama centered on the relationship between Phil Spector and defense attorney Linda Kenney Baden while the music business legend was on trial for the murder of Lana Clarkson.

recommendations.title: Spartan

recommendations.title: Redbelt
recommendations.overview: Martial artist Mike Terry lives by a strict code of no competitions, for he feels that such contests weaken fighters. After saving a famous action star from a brutal attack, Mike takes a job in the film industry. He soon finds his personal beliefs an

recommendations.title: The Exorcism of Emily Rose
recommendations.overview: When a younger girl called Emily Rose dies, everyone puts blame on the exorcism which was performed on her by Father Moore prior to her death. The priest is arrested on suspicion of murder. The trial begins with lawyer Erin Bruner representing Moore,

recommendations.title: The Yellow Sea
recommendations.overview: A Korean man in China takes an assassination job in South Korea to make money and find his missing wife. But when the job is botched, he is forced to go on the run from the police and the gangsters who paid him.

recommendations.title: Badlapur
recommendations.overview: After his wife and son are killed, a young man finds out the man behind the murder and fights against him, along committing some big mistakes.
